summary: The Optimism txpool validator divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise across existing transaction validation outcome returns; no txpool validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 230: M	crates/optimism/txpool/src/validator.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing invalid outcome, valid outcome, early outcome, and L1 gas cost balance-error returns.
No supported transaction type checks, interop validation, L1 data gas fee requirement, balance comparison, or propagation outcome behavior changed.
